categoryDescription: Checks related to Google Drive sharing, access controls, DLP, and data protection settings

checks.name: External Sharing Defaults
checks.description: Sharing outside the organization should be restricted or disabled by default to prevent accidental data exposure to external parties
checks.recommendedValue: External sharing restricted to allowlisted domains or disabled
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Apps > Google Workspace > Drive and Docs > Sharing settings > Set sharing outside the organization to 'Off' or 'Allowlisted domains'

checks.name: Link Sharing Default Settings
checks.description: Default link sharing should be set to 'Restricted' (specific people) rather than broad access to prevent unintended data exposure
checks.recommendedValue: Default link sharing set to 'Restricted' (specific people only)
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Apps > Google Workspace > Drive and Docs > Sharing settings > Set default link sharing to 'Restricted'

checks.name: Anyone With the Link Sharing Audit
checks.description: Files shared with 'Anyone with the link' are accessible to anyone on the internet and represent a significant data exposure risk
checks.recommendedValue: 'Anyone with the link' sharing disabled or tightly controlled
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Apps > Google Workspace > Drive and Docs > Sharing settings > Disable 'Anyone with the link' option or restrict to 'Domain users with the link'

checks.name: Shared Drive Creation Restrictions
checks.description: Shared Drive creation should be restricted to prevent uncontrolled proliferation and ensure proper governance of shared data repositories
checks.recommendedValue: Shared Drive creation restricted to specific groups or admins
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Apps > Google Workspace > Drive and Docs > Sharing settings > Shared drive creation > Restrict who can create shared drives

checks.name: Shared Drive Member Management
checks.description: Shared Drive member management should be controlled to prevent unauthorized users from being added or permissions being escalated
checks.recommendedValue: Only managers can add members and change access levels
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Apps > Google Workspace > Drive and Docs > Sharing settings > Shared drive settings > Configure member management permissions

checks.name: Shared Drive External Sharing
checks.description: External sharing on Shared Drives should be restricted to prevent sensitive organizational data from being shared outside the domain
checks.recommendedValue: External sharing on Shared Drives disabled or restricted to allowlisted domains
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Apps > Google Workspace > Drive and Docs > Sharing settings > Shared drive sharing > Restrict external sharing

checks.name: File Ownership Transfer Settings
checks.description: File ownership transfer should be controlled to prevent unauthorized data migration and maintain proper data governance chains
checks.recommendedValue: File ownership transfer restricted to admins or controlled process
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Apps > Google Workspace > Drive and Docs > Transfer ownership settings > Configure restrictions

checks.name: Drive for Desktop Allowed/Blocked
checks.description: Drive for Desktop syncs files locally and should be controlled to prevent data from being stored on unmanaged endpoints
checks.recommendedValue: Drive for Desktop restricted to managed devices or disabled
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Apps > Google Workspace > Drive and Docs > Features and Applications > Drive for Desktop > Configure access

checks.name: Third-Party App Drive Access
checks.description: Third-party applications with access to Drive data should be reviewed and restricted to prevent unauthorized data exfiltration
checks.recommendedValue: Third-party app access to Drive data restricted and reviewed
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Security > API controls > Third-party app access > Review and restrict apps with Drive access

checks.name: Drive DLP Rules Audit
checks.description: Data Loss Prevention rules should be configured to detect and prevent sharing of sensitive data through Google Drive
checks.recommendedValue: DLP rules configured for sensitive data types (PII, financial, health data)
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Security > Data protection > Manage rules > Create rules for sensitive data types in Drive

checks.name: Target Audience Settings
checks.description: Target audience settings control who can be suggested when sharing files and should be configured to limit accidental sharing
checks.recommendedValue: Target audiences configured to limit sharing suggestions appropriately
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Directory > Target audiences > Review and configure target audience groups

checks.name: Drive Add-ons Settings
checks.description: Drive add-ons can access file content and should be controlled to prevent data exposure through untrusted extensions
checks.recommendedValue: Drive add-on installation restricted to admin-approved add-ons
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Apps > Google Workspace > Drive and Docs > Features and Applications > Add-ons > Configure installation restrictions

checks.name: Offline Access Settings
checks.description: Offline access allows Drive files to be cached locally on devices and should be controlled to prevent data exposure on shared or unmanaged devices
checks.recommendedValue: Offline access disabled or restricted to managed devices
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Apps > Google Workspace > Drive and Docs > Features and Applications > Offline > Disable or restrict offline access
